name: Shankarpur
metaTitle: Property in Shankarpur Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Shankarpur Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
introduction: Shankarpur is a peaceful residential locality near Wardha Road, known for its calm environment and good connectivity to key city zones. Situated behind Royal Gondwana School, Shankarpur offers buyers a quiet alternative to busier corridors while remaining well-connected to Wardha Road, MIHAN, and central Nagpur. Mahalaxmi Infra's Mahalaxmi Nagar 43 project is located in Mouza Shankarpur — a fully developed, NMRDA sanctioned layout with ready-to-register plots and up to 90% bank financing available. The area is ideal for families looking for a peaceful neighbourhood with long-term investment value.
whyInvest: Quiet, family-friendly locality near Wardha Road
Behind Royal Gondwana School — strong social infrastructure
